build.command: cd elixir && mix deps.get && mix compile --warnings-as-errors

check.command: cd elixir && mix deps.get && mix compile --warnings-as-errors

lint.command: cd elixir && mix deps.get && mix format --check-formatted && mix credo --strict

test.command: cd elixir && mix deps.get && mix test

pack.command: cd elixir && mix deps.get && mix hex.build
